subcodes.first_line: Hallowed be He Who sent forth His Messengers unto His lands as a token of His grace; He is the All-Bountiful, the Most Generous
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی ارسل سفرآئه الی بلاده فضلا من عنده و هو الفضال الکریم انه ما اراد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @exhortations and counsels, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement
